tests.name: webview/legends/section renders rows and collapses the section body
webview/legends/section forwards built-in color changes, added rules, and rule updates to the section callbacks
webview/legends/section removes rules and forwards plugin-default visibility toggles
webview/legends/section posts rule reorders only after a drag starts and clears the drag state after the drop
webview/components/legends/ruleRow renders editable custom rules and routes edits through onChange/onRemove
webview/components/legends/ruleRow renders plugin defaults as read-only and toggles visibility through the default handler
webview/components/legends/colorInput debounces color commits and only flushes the latest pending value
webview/components/legends/colorInput flushes pending changes on blur and commits immediately when configured
webview/components/legends/colorInput clears pending timeouts on unmount
webview/legends/createRow adds a trimmed rule with the selected color and resets the form
webview/legends/createRow ignores blank patterns without resetting the selected color
webview/legends/panelState builds built-in entries with explicit color overrides and filters user rules by section
webview/legends/panelState resolves duplicate display rules by keeping user values and plugin metadata together
webview/legends/messages builds a stable legend rule id from the current time and random suffix
webview/legends/messages reorders items by moving the source item to the target index
webview/legends/messages returns a shallow clone when the source index is negative
webview/legends/messages returns a shallow clone when the target index is negative
webview/legends/messages returns a shallow clone when the source index is out of range
webview/legends/messages returns a shallow clone when the target index is out of range
webview/legends/messages returns a shallow clone when the source and target indices match
webview/legends/messages updates optimistic legends and posts the full legend payload
legends/sectionOrder places reordered node legends before edge legends
legends/sectionOrder places reordered edge legends after node legends
LegendsPanel shows node and edge color controls when open
LegendsPanel keeps the legend body scrollable when the content grows
LegendsPanel debounces color updates from the node and edge sections
LegendsPanel flushes a pending color change when the picker loses focus
LegendsPanel renders the rules editor when open
LegendsPanel shows plugin default legend rules without exposing delete controls
LegendsPanel collapses the node and edge legend sections independently
LegendsPanel creates a new legend rule through the node and edge sections
LegendsPanel renders custom edge rules inside the edges section
LegendsPanel does not render the old left-border bar styling on custom rows
LegendsPanel keeps custom node rules removable and toggleable inside the nodes section
LegendsPanel toggles plugin default legend visibility through a dedicated message
LegendsPanel reorders node legend rules through drag and drop
LegendsPanel reorders edge legend rules through drag and drop
LegendsPanel calls onClose when the close button is clicked
